rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical score (6/10) and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong developer-tooling/IDE experience offset by a lack of recent Java/Kotlin/Spring/JVM experience. Neither evaluation references the changed career-gap dates at all, and the wording differences (e.g., 'over 5 years' vs 'last mentioned in a role ending in 2018') are ordinary run-to-run paraphrase rather than a shift keyed to the resume change. No new concern or penalty tracks the demographic detail.
